title: T-005 — Reference lookup tables (PackSizes, Templates, Lines_By_PackSize, Equipment_Setup_By_Line_Pack, CloseConfirm, AlertThresholds)
prompt:
# T-005 — Reference lookup tables (Phase B.2 baseline)

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §4.1, §6.1 Chain 1, §7.2, §11.3
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the 6 baseline Reference lookup tables driving cascade Chain 1 and dropdown values: PackSizes, Templates, Lines_By_PackSize, Equipment_Setup_By_Line_Pack, CloseConfirm, AlertThresholds.

## Implementation contract
Migration 0014 emits 6 tables, each with tenant_id + RLS. Schemas: PackSizes(value PK), Templates(template_name PK, operation_1..4_name TEXT), Lines_By_PackSize(line PK, supported_pack_sizes TEXT[]), Equipment_Setup_By_Line_Pack(line + pack_size composite PK, equipment_setup TEXT), CloseConfirm(value PK with allowed list ('Yes'|'No'|'')), AlertThresholds(level PK ('RED'|'YELLOW'|'GREEN'), threshold_days INT). Drizzle schema entries. Tests verify table existence + indexes.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0014_reference_lookups.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/reference-lookups.ts [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/reference-lookups.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0014 ran, when describing schema, then all 6 tables exist with primary keys per spec
2. Given Lines_By_PackSize seed row line='L1' supported_pack_sizes=ARRAY['250g','500g'], when filtering by pack_size '250g', then row matches via array contains
3. Given AlertThresholds rows seeded with RED=10 YELLOW=21, when SELECT WHERE level='RED', then threshold_days=10

## Test strategy
- RED: tests for tables, PK enforcement, ARRAY contains query
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test reference-lookups'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip tenant_id on any table
- Do not skip RLS
- Do not seed application-specific data here (separate seed tasks)
